CONNECTORS_BEARER.description: Bearer that HERMES sends to every connector in this pod. Generated once on first deploy; rotate by re-deploying. Also has to be set as HERMES env in oscar-brain.

WEATHER_PORT.description: Host port for the weather connector's MCP server. HERMES needs to know this to call it.

WEATHER_API_KEY.description: OpenWeatherMap API key. Free tier (openweathermap.org/api) is sufficient for a household; the connector uses /data/2.5 endpoints which don't need a paid plan.

WEATHER_UNITS.description: Unit system. Metric → Celsius + m/s (converted to km/h by the connector); imperial → Fahrenheit + mph.

CLOUD_LLM_PORT.description: Host port for the cloud-LLM connector's MCP server. HERMES routes per-request cloud escalations here.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: API key for Anthropic Claude (sk-ant-...). Leave empty to disable the Anthropic provider — the cloud-LLM connector returns a clear error for that vendor if so. At least one of ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / GOOGLE_API_KEY should be set if you actually want cloud escalations.

GOOGLE_API_KEY.description: API key for Google Gemini (Google AI Studio key, starts with AIza). Leave empty to disable the Google provider.

POSTGRES_PASSWORD.description: Must match POSTGRES_PASSWORD from the oscar-brain template. The cloud-LLM connector writes audit rows into the same database.

TZ.description: IANA time zone for log timestamps.
